title: Fresh 3D Armors
description: Just cool armor. Requed ETF & EMF / Optifine.
body:
Hi! Its just resource pack which is adding a cool 3d armor from popular resource pack.
Can i use this in my modpack?
Yes, of course!
Can i add this pack to my other?
Yes but note me and my pack in your project.
Can i re-upload this pack to other website?
Yes but note me and my pack and write is a port. Good play!

![Position](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e4ef47bbfb8a9d8834b3ce459b2022a150012b2.png)

Please, drag pack higer than pack added an player animation on adding armor you dont like.
# WARNING! The resource pack dont wanna work on 1.21.9 and maybe higer, please if you want the copper armor its adding it now download the copper age backport mod to any version 1.20-1.21.3
and you can use custom copper armor model
